title: Incident X-7
content: The signal originated from Sector 4. First contact was anomalous. It spoke in our voices but did not understand our words.

title: Project OMEGA
content: Subject 09 has breached containment. The atmospheric scrubbers in the lower levels have been compromised. [DATA EXPUNGED]

title: Last Transmission
content: If anyone is listening to this... we are holding out in the old observatory. We have power for maybe two more days.
